name: Peanut Butter Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Mix together flour, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl.
3. In a large bowl, beat together peanut butter and softened butter with sugars until fluffy.
4. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract until blended.
5. Stir in the dry ingredients until just combined.
6. Fold in chocolate chips.
7. Spread mixture into a greased 8x8-inch pan.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until golden brown and edges are set.
9. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into squares.
10. Makes about 16 two-inch-square cookies.
